title: Dataset for "Climate drives plasticity, local adaptation and maladaptation in apple trees"
author: Cornille, Amandine
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset supports the study  “Climate drives plasticity, local adaptation and maladaptation in apple trees.”   
 The dataset include genome-wide SNP variation, environmental variables, and microsatellite markers. 
  Contents  
 
 SNP genotype data and environmental variables for GEA analysis (GEA_data.zip). 
 SSR (Microsatellite) data (SSR_data.zip). 
 Genotype data called from RNAseq data for pixy analysis of Fst, Dxy and nucleotide diversity (*.vcf.gz files). 
 
  Related Publication  
 This dataset accompanies the manuscript: 
  "Climate drives plasticity, local adaptation and maladaptation in apple trees"  
 If you use this dataset, please cite both the Zenodo record and the associated publication.
